author: gunthercox
text: Convert benchmarks test into actual unit test that can fail

author: gunthercox
text: Right now there is a file called `benchmarks.py` that runs a few general performance benchmark tests. This script should be converted to a regular test case so that a build will fail if the tests take too long to execute. This change is intended to help prevent performance regressions.

author: gunthercox
text: Convert benchmark tests into unit tests
